movie.actors: Val Kilmer, Tommy Lee Jones, Jim Carrey, Nicole Kidman
movie.awards: Nominated for 3 Oscars. Another 10 wins & 22 nominations.
movie.plot: Batman must battle former district attorney Harvey Dent, who is now Two-Face and Edward Nygma, The Riddler with help from an amorous psychologist and a young circus acrobat who becomes his sidekick, Robin.
movie.title: Batman Forever
movie.writer: Bob Kane (characters), Lee Batchler (story), Janet Scott Batchler (story), Lee Batchler (screenplay), Janet Scott Batchler (screenplay), Akiva Goldsman (screenplay)
